name: R-8 component-add writes the four required files (component story unit-test axe-test) per §26
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/component-add.sh" --name Button --target-dir src/components 2>err.txt && [ -s src/components/Button/Button.tsx ] && [ -s src/components/Button/Button.stories.tsx ] && [ -s src/components/Button/Button.test.tsx ] && [ -s src/components/Button/Button.axe.test.tsx ] && echo four 1>&2
